name: design-everyday-things
description: Apply foundational design principles: affordances, signifiers, constraints, feedback, and conceptual models. Use when the user mentions "why is this confusing", "affordance", "error prevention", "discoverability", "human-centered design", "fault tolerance", "mental model", "mapping", or "seven stages of action". Also trigger when diagnosing why users make mistakes, reducing product complexity, or improving error messages and feedback systems. Covers the gulfs of execution and evaluation. For usa
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 一套基础交互设计原则库，专门帮你诊断产品为什么难用、用户为什么老犯错。适合在需要降低复杂性、优化错误提示和反馈，或想打造更人性化设计时参考使用。
